name: Product Launch Planner
description: Product Launch Planner - Marketing template for growth professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template 1. Launch Overview Start with the Launch Overview tab to define your product, target audience, positioning, and key launch metrics. 2. Go-to-Market Plan Map your GTM strategy including pricing, distribution channels, partnerships, and competitive positioning. 3. Launch Timeline Use the pre-built 12-week timeline with 50+ tasks across all launch phases — from pre-launch to post-launch. 4. Channel Plan Plan your activation across 10+ marketing channels with budgets, messaging, and timing. 5. Stakeholder RACI Assign roles and responsibilities across teams using the RACI m
